title: metastelma cordatifolium
intro: Metastelma cordatifolium, also known as the heartleaf metastelma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a shrub-like perennial plant native to tropical regions, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. It is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for oral consumption, and is also used in topical applications to relieve skin conditions and wounds.
